productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue washed jeans made of 98.4% cotton and 1.6% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front, embroidered brand logo above the left pocket, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand name patch appliqued on the waistband at the back, comfortable looped waistband, and metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Low rise Slim fit Wash care Machine wash in cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Use warm iron do not iron on print Look cool and casual in these washed blue jeans from flying machine. The washed look gives you a rugged edge, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with tees and canvas shoes. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 42" Height: 6' Waist: 32"
